name: email_thread_action_items_only
system_prompt: Extract action items only. No commentary.
user_prompt:
From this email thread, return exactly 4 bullet action items.

Thread:
Ari: We need legal review on the revised MSA before Friday.
Mina: I can send legal a redline by EOD.
Ari: Also customer onboarding docs are outdated.
Jon: I will update docs section 3 and 4 tonight.
Mina: Finance still needs the invoice schedule for ACME.
Ari: I can send finance the draft tomorrow morning.
Jon: We still haven't booked UAT with the client.
Mina: I'll propose two UAT slots for next week.
source_text: Ari: We need legal review on the revised MSA before Friday. Mina: I can send legal a redline by EOD. Ari: Also customer onboarding docs are outdated. Jon: I will update docs section 3 and 4 tonight. Mina: Finance still needs the invoice schedule for ACME. Ari: I can send finance the draft tomorrow morning. Jon: We still haven't booked UAT with the client. Mina: I'll propose two UAT slots for next week.
key_points: send invoice schedule draft to finance
rubric: Action extraction accuracy, no fabricated tasks, concise bullet formatting.
escalation_prompt: Return only actionable bullets with owners and tasks.
